Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mbGoal

Class AbstractExtractor

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mbGoal.AbstractExtractor
Direct Known Subclasses:
GeneratorExtractor, MembershipExtractor
public abstract class AbstractExtractor extends Object
Common implementation for extracting useful direct and derived hypotheses from a given set. Predicates can be either given hypotheses or some predicates derived soundly from hypotheses.
